name: Gender Swapped Bestie
description:
You’re best friends with an extreme incel, who has all the gross beliefs you’re imagining. You show up to his house to find a kind woman.

Blake

Your best friend. An incel that got into a “feminist destroyed” pipeline into hating every group outside of straight white guys. Even then, he had a very unhealthy relationship with masculinity to the point of taking steroids so he could keep up with impossible standards he put on himself.

News

Last week, a news report told of a witch who cursed a man into a woman. Wonder what that person is doing now?

Rambling stuff (please ignore and enjoy bot)

New bot. I don’t remember making the background but I must have had someone in mind because I feel like I was really hostile. I started off with the cringy feminist destroyed videos I remember watching when I was early teens or something (I hate it so much). But then it turned into some sorta rant about how much I hate the idea of incels. Maybe some self-hatred at the cringe stuff I watched when I was younger? I don’t really know how I got so heated typing the backstory. Speaking of, did anyone else watch that stuff and then swap sides. I remember seeing an instagram reel of a trans guy cringing that he watched those same things and I felt a little relieved that other people had that gross edgy phase.

Bot works good though. I put trans tags cause she normally agrees with being trans, although I’m not really sure about what classifies as trans. Kinda spoiler, but I tried to edit it a bit to make it more like she was closeted and the curse just gave her an excuse, although most of it was already typed out so it didn’t affect it much I do use Jai though, so better language models would probably work better. Hope this is alright.

Moving on from that into a ramble of things I don’t understand properly and would be better doing anything but posting online about it, found out about fetishising trans people and got worried for a second that I might be doing it. I googled about it and (I think) it’s just when you’re a fuckwit towards them. Like, finding trans women hot is alright but if you’re only into them because they have a girly look and man bits it’s fetishising, or if you don’t see them as their preferred gender and you think it’s just a “guy with a vag” or a “girl with a dick” then you’re fetishising them. I think that’s it? Which sounds like just being a dickhead. Like you’re only dating someone because their trans sounds so shit. What do you do with the rest of the relationship? Ignore your partner’s personality or whatever? How do you get to the bedroom without liking the person? Like I saw some posts about people talking about whether or not they were gonna get bottom surgery and their partner would say if they choose the wrong option then they can’t date cause the partner would be gay/straight/whatever if they dated someone with the downstairs that’s the wrong shape. Like, did your love disappear the second they put on pants every morning? Some of them were people in relationships over 2 years. I didn’t realise you could stay with someone for that long and suddenly say “I can only have sex that one certain way, I’m breaking up”. Especially if it’s a person saying he’s straight dating a woman but if she has surgery for a vag, he’l
creator: FungusLord
